visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene starts in a cluttered office space with multiple desks. A woman with a red ponytail and glasses leans over her desk, which is covered with papers and supplies. To her left, another woman with long black hair and bangs laughs directly at the camera, showing a wide, cheerful expression. The background reveals white walls, large windows showing green trees, and typical office equipment like printers and shelves. (2) The camera transitions to a close-up of a person's inner forearm and wrist. A pair of hands carefully places a small, rectangular white alcohol swab onto the skin. Subsequently, the hands apply a strip of translucent medical tape over the swab to hold it in place. The skin is pale, and the background is slightly blurred, focusing entirely on the application process. (3) A young woman wearing a light green, semi-transparent shirt with a sunflower tattoo on her right forearm is interviewed. She looks directly at the camera, smiling as she holds her arm out to show the alcohol swab taped to her wrist. The office environment behind her is brightly lit with overhead fluorescent lights, casting a soft glow on the workspace. (4) Another female colleague with black hair and a ponytail is seen sitting at her desk, working on a laptop. She smiles and laughs as someone off-camera applies an alcohol swab to her wrist. Her desk is filled with personal items, including a pink coffee cup and various stationary. The lighting remains bright and consistent with a professional studio or modern office. (5) A woman in a black shirt with bangs is shown up close, her face lighting up with laughter. She holds her arm out, showing the swab being removed or checked. The camera captures her expressive eyes and broad smile as she interacts with her colleagues. In the background, shelves are filled with colorful toys and figurines, adding a playful atmosphere to the office. (6) A man with thick curly black hair, wearing glasses and white earbuds, is seen sitting at his desk. He holds up his hand in a specific gesture, showing three fingers while folding the others. He has a playful and slightly confused expression on his face. The desk behind him has a computer monitor and various office supplies scattered around. (7) A woman with long light-brown hair and large white headphones around her neck looks down at her wrist as she types on a laptop. She appears focused but then turns to the camera with a surprised and amused expression. The office background shows other coworkers moving around, and the overall color tone is natural and vibrant. (8) A woman in a blue hoodie is shown in a medium shot, laughing so hard she leans back. She checks her wrist and gestures towards it while talking excitedly. Behind her, a white cabinet is topped with a collection of colorful character figurines, including several versions of cartoon characters. The scene is filled with high-energy social interaction and amusement. (9) The final shot is a wide view of the entire office floor. Multiple employees are seen at their desks, many of them waving their hands or cheering towards the camera. The person filming extends their hand into the frame, palm open, as if presenting the lively scene. Large text overlays in Traditional Chinese appear on the screen as the group continues to laugh together.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 實測都市傳說. [Subtitle]: 酒精片貼手腕5分鐘. [Subtitle]: 會紅，代表喝酒也會紅. (2) [Subtitle]: 你喝酒是臉會紅的嗎？ [Subtitle]: 會. (3) [Subtitle]: 沒有. (4) [Subtitle]: 那現在拿一瓶來. [Subtitle]: 馬上馬上喝一杯. (5) [Subtitle]: 臉會紅的人嗎？ [Subtitle]: 好像不會. (6) [Subtitle]: 真的沒有. [Slogan]: 去看這集. [Logo]: @大頭佛工作室. (7) [Variety]: 寶藏女孩. (8) [Subtitle]: 你也沒有. [Subtitle]: 但我喝酒會臉紅欸. [Subtitle]: 而且我是超紅欸. [Subtitle]: 偷喝. [Subtitle]: 在家裡喝. [Subtitle]: 我是真的會臉紅的. (9) [Slogan]: 跟KID哥一起喝. (10) [Subtitle]: 都不會. [Subtitle]: 無中指的喝. [Variety]: [好奇怪的人]. (11) [Subtitle]: 輪到你了. (12) [Subtitle]: 沒有. [Subtitle]: 所以大家酒量都很好. [Subtitle]: 沒有 我酒超差. [Subtitle]: 酒品也很差. [Subtitle]: 下次喝. (13) [Subtitle]: 好像要失敗了. [Subtitle]: 真的嗎. [Subtitle]: 我立刻來看一下. (14) [Subtitle]: 看起來也沒有. (15) [Subtitle]: 年紀大了代謝比較差. (16) [Subtitle]: 講到年紀. (17) [Variety]: 這群女人激不得.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-arousal burst of collective laughter from several women, creating an atmosphere of intense amusement and social bonding. An upbeat, quirky background music track with a fast tempo and playful piano notes plays. A sharp, resonant "ding" sound effect is heard, emphasizing a specific visual point. The primary voices are high-pitched and energetic, speaking rapidly. (2) A distinct "whoosh" sound effect marks a transition between scenes, followed by the subtle crinkling sound of plastic and the sticky noise of medical tape being pulled. The background music shifts to a more suspenseful, rhythmic electronic track with a steady beat. The ambient noise floor is low, suggesting a controlled indoor environment, but the focused sound of the application is clear. (3) A female voice asks a question with a friendly, inquisitive tone, characterized by moderate pitch and clear articulation. Another female voice responds with a simple "Yes," followed by more lighthearted chatter. The background music continues at a consistent volume, blending with the sound of rustling clothing and the faint hum of office equipment. The speech is casual and conversational. (4) A new female speaker enters with an animated and slightly sarcastic tone, her speech rate increasing as she makes a joke. This is accompanied by the sound of a dull "thud" on a wooden surface and more background laughter. The background music's percussive elements become more pronounced, matching the rhythmic flow of the dialogue. The vocal quality is crisp and professional. (5) The audio features a mix of overlapping female voices, all expressing excitement and laughter. One voice stands out with a teasing, melodic intonation. A cartoon-like "boing" sound effect is inserted for comedic effect. The background music swells slightly in volume, filling the gaps between speech. The acoustic environment has a slight room resonance, typical of a large open-plan office. (6) A male voice is heard briefly, providing a contrast with a deeper pitch and a more relaxed, humorous delivery style. This is followed by a sudden burst of high-pitched giggling from the group. The background music maintains its quirky, meme-like vibe. There is a clear separation between the primary voices and the instrumental track, with high signal-to-noise ratio. (7) A female voice speaks in a narrative, explanatory tone, her pitch variability increasing as she describes her observations. The sound of rapid keyboard typing is audible in the background, along with a metallic click. The background music continues to provide a rhythmic foundation, using light synthesizer textures and a steady, mid-tempo beat. The atmosphere remains highly positive. (8) An older-sounding female voice speaks with authority and humor, leading to a massive wave of group laughter that reaches a high peak in volume. The sound of hands clapping and a soft percussive impact can be heard. The background music reaches a crescendo, with brighter spectral characteristics. The vocal arousal level is at its highest point here, indicating peak emotional engagement. (9) The video concludes with a cacophony of cheerful shouting and sustained laughter from the entire group. The background music remains prominent, featuring a final comedic sting. The ambient noise floor is dominated by the social chatter. Multiple voices overlap, creating a dense acoustic texture. A final "pop" sound effect accompanies the appearance of the end screen text overlays.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document a lighthearted office experiment where colleagues test an urban legend regarding alcohol tolerance using medical swabs. The video aims to entertain through group chemistry and humorous reactions.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video is a social-native variety style clip characterized by high energy, frequent subtitles, and comedic sound effects, reflecting a close-knit office culture.
